_layout_notes: Six wide-matrix sheets, each sharing the same skeleton: R1 (or R0/R2) = Region row (East/West/North/South spans), R2 (or R1/R3) = State column codes, data rows below carry rate-type / band labels in col 0 and percentage values in cols 1+.
Sheet engines are dispatched by sheet name inside parsers/engines/universal-sompo.js; layout per sheet differs in row interpretation but not in column layout.
RTO cluster mappings (UP1/2/3, RJ1/2/3, MP1/2, KA1/2, DL-NCR carve-outs, Tri-City) are embedded in the engine — no separate RTO master sheet exists in this workbook.
Volume / GWP / Discount cap / Sliding-price logic per sheet is encoded into rule fan-out at parse time (see engine for details).
